title: Strawberries N' Creme
description: A twist on the vanilla experience providing quality of life and accessibility improvements.
body:
**Strawberries N' Creme** is a work in progress modpack that I've been working on for a while. It's main goals are to add small quality of life improvements to the client side, and add some accessibilty features. 

Originally starting as slight adjustments to [Xae's Chocolatey Re-Melted Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/choclatey-re-melted) it's since grown into its own pack, primarily for use in smaller community servers. 

~~**Pack is going through a rework for version 1.21.3 to use [Dough Modpack by Merith TK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dough-modpack) as it's base build.**~~

^ Due to the creator of this pack being unable to keep it maintained, Strawb will no longer be using Dough as it's base. 

What is it using as it's base? GOD KNOWS! I'll come up with a skeleton framework...Eventually XD
